description: Creates Conditional Access policies that respond to Entra ID Identity Protection risk detections. Covers sign-in risk (impossible travel, anonymous IP, password spray) and user risk (leaked credentials, anomalous activity). Equivalent to Okta behaviors module.

risk_profile_effects.standard: Risk detection enabled but no enforcement (log only). Sign-in risk and user risk policies not created.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: Sign-in risk: require MFA at medium+ risk. User risk: require password change at medium+ risk.
risk_profile_effects.strict: Sign-in risk: block at low+ risk. User risk: require password change at low+ risk.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your security tier. Controls how the system responds to detected identity risks.

sign_in_risk_action.label: Sign-In Risk Action
sign_in_risk_action.client_description: What happens when a risky sign-in is detected (impossible travel, anonymous IP, etc.). 'allow' — log only, no enforcement. 'mfa_required' — force MFA step-up. 'block' — deny sign-in entirely. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

user_risk_action.label: User Risk Action
user_risk_action.client_description: What happens when a user's account is flagged as risky (leaked credentials, anomalous activity). 'allow' — log only. 'password_change' — force password reset. 'block' — deny sign-in. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

sign_in_risk_level.label: Sign-In Risk Level Threshold
sign_in_risk_level.client_description: Minimum risk level that triggers the sign-in risk action. 'low' catches more events (more false positives). 'high' only catches severe risks. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

user_risk_level.label: User Risk Level Threshold
user_risk_level.client_description: Minimum risk level that triggers the user risk action. 'low' catches more events. 'high' only catches severe risks. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

outputs.sign_in_risk_policy_id: Conditional Access policy ID for sign-in risk response (null if action is allow)
outputs.user_risk_policy_id: Conditional Access policy ID for user risk response (null if action is allow)
outputs.effective_sign_in_risk_action: Resolved action for sign-in risk events
outputs.effective_user_risk_action: Resolved action for user risk events
outputs.effective_sign_in_risk_level: Resolved minimum sign-in risk level threshold
outputs.effective_user_risk_level: Resolved minimum user risk level threshold
